channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democrats gain a 39-year-old Senate warrior attacking Trump and 'Prince Don and Prince Eric': Jon Ossoff
item.description: Ossoff is running for reelection, calling Trump a 'national disgrace' leading a 'Mar-a-Lago mafia' and 'the most corrupt administration of all time.'

item.title: Trump hails World Cup as huge win for America: 'It turned out we were a soccer country, and I think it's going to remain'
item.description: White House FIFA Task Force head Andrew Giuliani said the event is about not just games but 'all these incredible, incredible cultural moments.'

item.title: World looks to post-Iran oil market offsetting most Hormuz volumes in years as ships reject U.S.-backed alternate route
item.description: Goldman Sachs estimated that enough Mideast pipeline capacity could be added to insulate 75% of pre-war Gulf exports by the end of 2028.

item.title: Judge blocks Trump officials from using Biden rule to cut billions in grants
item.description: New Jersey's AG argued the cuts held programs hostage; the judge ruled the clause did not support the administration's claim.
